## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Sunset;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Sunset { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
weather, time, evening, night

## Categories
arrows, weather

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/sunset)
